hero.imageAlt: Editorial interior, morning light raking across a freshly painted plaster wall in soft bone white, minimal furnishings in warm walnut tones
hero.headline: High-End Results, Absolute Predictability.

intro.label: A craftsman studio, not a contractor
intro.body: A clean, high-quality painting experience on Bainbridge Island and in Seattle — without the usual contractor chaos. Obsessive prep, daily progress reports, and a finish that lasts.

personas.kicker: For the home you already love

personas.kicker: For the one the neighbors see

personas.label: Light Commercial
personas.kicker: For the one that pays the bills

configuratorTeaser.headline: Get a written ballpark in under a minute.
configuratorTeaser.body: Answer four questions about your project and our virtual estimator returns a transparent price range — before you ever get on a call.

zPatternRows.label: The Prep Methodology
zPatternRows.headline: Prep is 90% of the job. The paint is the easy part.
zPatternRows.body: Most contractors race to get paint on the wall. We spend two-to-three times longer on the surface underneath — sanding, filling, caulking, and priming — because the finish is only as good as what's beneath it. Two years, five years, ten years from now, our work still looks intentional.

zPatternRows.label: We Protect Your Home
zPatternRows.headline: Your home is not a job site. We don't act like it is.
zPatternRows.body: Floors covered before we carry a single ladder through the door. Furniture moved and re-wrapped. Switch plates bagged and labeled. Tools, tarps, and debris cleared from the work zone every single evening. You come home to a home, not a construction mess.

zPatternRows.label: Daily Updates
zPatternRows.headline: The project runs like you're running it.
zPatternRows.body: A short written update at the end of every workday — what we finished, what's next, any surprises we ran into. Photos when it helps. No wondering what's happening inside your house while you're at work.

zPatternRows.label: The Gallery
zPatternRows.headline: Finishes that photograph as well as they live.
zPatternRows.body: Every project is photographed before we call it done. Macro detail of cut lines, cabinet finishes, trim returns — proof that the last mile matters. Browse the portfolio for completed work across Bainbridge Island and the north Seattle neighborhoods.
